sentences.target: On marche le long de la rive.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ maʁʃ lə lɔ̃ də la ʁiv/

translations.fr: On marche le long de la rive.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ maʁʃ lə lɔ̃ də la ʁiv/
translations.es: Caminamos a lo largo de la orilla del río.
translations.it: Stiamo camminando lungo la riva del fiume.
translations.pt: Estamos caminhando ao longo da margem do rio.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đi dọc bờ sông.
translations.ar: نحن نسير على طول ضفة النهر.
translations.hi: हम नदी के किनारे चल रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περπατάμε κατά μήκος της όχθης του ποταμού.
translations.id: Kami sedang berjalan di sepanjang tepi sungai.
translations.ja: 川岸に沿って歩いています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun often used for 'we' in colloquial French.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular agreeing with 'On'.
Definite article (masculine singular), part of the fixed expression 'le long de'.
Noun used in the multiword preposition 'le long de' meaning 'along'.
Preposition completing the fixed expression 'le long de' ('along').
Definite article (feminine singular) marking the noun 'rive'.
Common noun; object of the preposition phrase 'le long de'.

sentences.target: Je t'attends près de la rive.

translations.fr: Je t'attends près de la rive.
translations.en: I’m waiting for you near the riverbank.
translations.es: Te espero cerca de la orilla del río.
translations.de: Ich warte auf dich in der Nähe des Flussufers.
translations.it: Ti aspetto vicino alla riva del fiume.
translations.ru: Я жду тебя рядом с берегом реки.
translations.pt: Estou te esperando perto da margem do rio.
translations.he: אני מחכה לך ליד גדת הנהר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi bạn gần bờ sông.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op je dicht bij de rivieroever.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на тебе біля берега річки.
translations.hi: मैं नदी के किनारे के पास तुम्हारा इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Czekam na ciebie w pobliżu brzegu rzeki.
translations.el: Σε περιμένω κοντά στην όχθη του ποταμού.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på deg nær elvebredden.
translations.id: Aku menunggumu di dekat tepi sungai.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på dig nära flodstranden.
translations.ro: Te aștept aproape de malul râului.
translations.cs: Čekám na tebe blízko břehu řeky.
translations.da: Jeg venter på dig tæt på flodbredden.
translations.ja: 川岸の近くであなたを待っています。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Clitic object pronoun (2nd person singular) preceding the verb; direct object of 'attendre'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular agreeing with 'Je'.
Adverb forming the complex preposition 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Preposition completing 'près de'.
Definite article (feminine singular) marking the noun 'rive'.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'de' in 'près de la rive'.

translations.en: They’re having a picnic on the riverbank.
translations.es: Están haciendo un picnic en la orilla del río.
translations.it: Stanno facendo un picnic sulla riva del fiume.
translations.ru: Они устраивают пикник на берегу реки.
translations.pt: Eles estão fazendo piquenique na margem do rio.
translations.he: הם עושים פיקניק על גדת הנהר.
translations.vi: Họ đang dã ngoại bên bờ sông.
translations.ar: هم يقيمون نزهة على ضفة النهر.
translations.uk: Вони влаштували пікнік на березі річки.
translations.hi: वे नदी के किनारे पिकनिक मना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κάνουν πικνίκ στην όχθη του ποταμού.
translations.id: Mereka sedang piknik di tepi sungai.
translations.ro: Ei fac un picnic pe malul râului.
translations.ja: 川岸でピクニックをしています。

tokens.explanation: Third-person plural subject pronoun (masculine by default).
Hyphenated verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article (feminine singular) marking the noun 'rive'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu peins la rive au coucher du soleil.
sentences.reading: /ty pɛ̃ la ʁiv o kuʃe dy sɔlɛj/

translations.fr: Tu peins la rive au coucher du soleil.
translations.ipa: /ty pɛ̃ la ʁiv o kuʃe dy sɔlɛj/
translations.en: You’re painting the riverbank at sunset.
translations.es: Estás pintando la orilla del río al atardecer.
translations.de: Du malst das Flussufer bei Sonnenuntergang.
translations.it: Stai dipingendo la riva del fiume al tramonto.
translations.yue: 你喺日落嘅時候畫緊河岸。
translations.ru: Ты рисуешь берег реки на закате.
translations.pt: Você está pintando a margem do rio ao pôr do sol.
translations.he: אתה מצייר את גדת הנהר בשעת שקיעה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang vẽ bờ sông lúc hoàng hôn.
translations.ar: أنت ترسم ضفة النهر عند الغروب.
translations.nl: Je schildert de rivieroever bij zonsondergang.
translations.uk: Ти малюєш берег річки на заході сонця.
translations.hi: तुम सूर्यास्त के समय नदी के किनारे का चित्र बना रहे हो.
translations.pl: Malujesz brzeg rzeki o zachodzie słońca.
translations.el: Ζωγραφίζεις την όχθη του ποταμού στο ηλιοβασίλεμα.
translations.id: Kamu sedang melukis tepi sungai saat matahari terbenam.
translations.cs: Maluješ říční břeh při západu slunce.
translations.ja: 夕暮れに川岸を描いています。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular agreeing with 'Tu'.
Definite article (feminine singular) marking the noun 'rive'.
Direct object of the verb 'peins'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and article 'le'; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Deverbal noun meaning 'setting'; head of the PP 'au coucher du soleil'.
Contraction of 'de' and 'le'; links 'coucher' to its complement 'soleil'.
Common noun; complement of 'du' in the PP 'du soleil'.
